dxf_files.name: parking_rotated.dxf

dxf_files.name: parking_hatched.dxf
dxf_files.notes: Derived from parking_rotated.dxf — solid HATCH fills added to FCS-PATH, FCS-DRIVEWAY, BBS-EX-ASPHALT
known_issues: Only closed polylines hatched — many open polylines left unhatched

scripts.purpose: ezdxf version check and drawing addon inspection
Count entity types per target layer
Find entities by true RGB color (254,204,102 = parking)
Find texts not rotated — search what's around them
Analyse LWPOLYLINE rectangles as parking bays
Find 4-vertex polylines matching parking bay dimensions
Render full DXF to PNG using ezdxf Frontend
Render with unique color per layer (manual matplotlib)
Add SOLID hatch to closed polylines by layer
Final rotation: long bay lines (4.5-7m), expanding radii 15/30/60m
